pi_items.source: Task description and verified against setup_task.sh (line 12) and export_result.sh (line 8)
Task description specifies Z = 0 to 60 mm; verified from geometry specification
Maximum of three section diameters [8.0, 12.0, 10.0] = 12.0 mm
Section 1 spans Z=0 to Z=15 mm; center = (0+15)/2 = 7.5 mm
Task description: Motor coupling section has diameter 8 mm
Task description identifies this section as 'Motor coupling'
Section 2 spans Z=15 to Z=40 mm; center = (15+40)/2 = 27.5 mm
Task description: Bearing seat section has diameter 12 mm
Task description identifies this section as 'Bearing seat'
Section 3 spans Z=40 to Z=60 mm; center = (40+60)/2 = 50.0 mm
Task description: Gear mount section has diameter 10 mm
Task description identifies this section as 'Gear mount'
Standard 5% manufacturing tolerance; consistent with verifier.py line 91

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a stepped shaft for a robotic gearbox with three coaxial cylindrical sections: Section 1 (Motor Coupling) has 8 mm diameter and 15 mm height; Section 2 (Bearing Seat) has 12 mm diameter and 25 mm height; Section 3 (Gear Mount) has 10 mm diameter and 20 mm height. Total height is 60 mm, maximum diameter is 12 mm. The expected volume is 5152.21 mm³ (1640π), verified by calculating individual cylinder volumes. The file should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/stepped_shaft.FCStd. All z-center values correspond to the midpoints of their respective sections.
